text:
is the third story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

Shortly after their graduation, the members of the 104th Cadet Corps are suddenly forced into a fight against the Titans as the Colossal Titan appears at Trost District and breaks through the Wall. During the battle, Eren Jaeger learns of the mysterious power deep inside him.
